title: AkatzumaPick
description: When the player selects a block (default middle mouse button), if it cannot be found in the inventory, it will be searched and replaced from Tom's simple storage.
body:
* When players select blocks (default middle mouse button), if the item is not found in the inventory, it will be retrieved from [Tom's Simple Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) and replace the item held by the player; * Requires a bound high-end wireless terminal in the player's backpack; * In single-player mode, the terminal must be manually opened once after each save file load.
* 玩家选取方块（默认鼠标中键）时，物品栏找不到会从[汤姆的简易存储](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage)中查找并替换玩家手中的物品； * 需要玩家背包中有绑定过的高级无线终端； * 单人模式每次加载存档后，需要先手动打开一次终端。
